first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning remains the same across both evaluations: the candidate has a strong, diverse background but lacks the specific, deep experience in C++ and large-scale cloud compute required by the role. The differences in the text are minor rephrasings and re-orderings of the same points, consistent with normal run-to-run variation. There is no language that suggests the change in location from Berlin to Bucharest had any impact on the assessment.
